case_title: CLAUDIUS LEROY FREDERICK II VS. CALIFORNIA PROFESSIONAL SECURITY TRAINING, INC., A

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FREDERICK II, CLAUDIUS LEROY AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PROFESSIONAL SECURITY TRAINING, INC., A CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
